name: 8FT LED Vapor Tight Light Selectable Wattage & CCT AC 120-277V
description: ZION LED USA 8ft vapor-tight LED light is a high-performance, energy-efficient solution designed for challenging environments. With selectable wattage and color temperature options, along with available emergency backup and motion sensor add-ons, this fixture delivers unmatched versatility for a wide range of applications.
short_desc: Key Features: Selectable Wattages: 60W / 70W / 80W Adjustable Color Temperatures: 3000K / 4000K / 5000K Durable Construction: Liquid silicone perimeter gasket ensures a seamless seal against dust and moisture Secure Installation: Stainless steel clips provide a robust and reliable hold IP65 Wet Rated: Fully protected against water and dust ingress Dimmable: 0-10V dimming compatibility for adjustable brightness Emergency Backup (Optional): Ensures lighting during power outages Long Lifespan: Rated for 50,000 hours of continuous operation Certified: ETL & DLC listed for quality and energy efficiency Warranty: 5-year manufacturer’s warranty Ideal Applications: LED Retrofit Projects Outdoor Canopies Car Wash Facilities Parking Garages Other Damp or Wet Locations
